titleStmt.title: SII 38.500: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 500. (A.R. No. 500 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Rājarājadēva (III) Year: 15+1st Mithuna, śu. di. 11 Monday, sōdi = 31st May 1232 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription registers the sale of two pieces of land, each measuring 2(3/4) vēli, 1 mā, 1 kāṇi and 1 mundirigai of wet land, and 40(3/4) vēli and 2(1/2) mā of dry land, a house and also a garden, and all other appurtenances, by two persons Srutimāṉ Ūraṉ Nambiyāṉ alias Vīramēdēvi Peraiyan of Vaḍapāḍvūr and his nephew Mallan Maṇavāḷaṉ alias Geṅgādiraiyan, to Śrutimāṉ Nāyaṉ Sōṟaṉ alias Iruṅgōḷar, a landlord of Neṟkuḷam at Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu for 15,000 aṉṟāḍunaṟkāśu. Ayyanār Taṇakkāṇiḍār temple figures among the boundaries of the first piece of the land sold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mituṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaḷ(k)kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ vaṭakarai I[rājarāja]vaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu neṟku
ḷam kāṇiuṭaiya curutimāṉ nāyaṉcoṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṟku vaṭapāṭāvūr Uṭaiya curitimāṉ Ūraṉnampiyāṉa virametāvip peraiṉum Ivan tamaiyaṉ makaṉ mallaṉmaṇavāḷaṉāṉa keṅkatiraiyaṉum Ivviruvom nilavi
laipiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāy nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa naṉceynilattu Ivaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṟa pāṇṭaṉeriyeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa kuḷattukkum viḷainilattukkum Ellaiyāvatu vaṭapāṟkellai kuṭamuruṭ
ṭikaṟaṭṭuk Ayyaṉpātti meṭṭukku teṟkum viṟkiṉṟāṉ kāṇiyāṉa puṟkuḷattu Ellai caṭaiyāṇṭār vaṭṭattukkum poṉṉāṇṭār vaṭṭattukkum Ūraṉeṉṟa nilattukku teṟkum melpāṟkellai kuḷattil nāṭu kā
lai Ayyanār taṇakkāṇṭārkoyilukku teṟkum kaṭuppar kiṇaṟṟukkum tāḻaikkuṭṭattu karaikkum Ūr matuḷ nakarattār matuḷukkum paṟaiccerikkum kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai Ayyāṟaṉ puḷikkum [maṟa tippaḷat]tukku
vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai pūṉaikkaṟaṭṭukku meṟkum puṉcey viṭṭu kaḷarukku meṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey patiṉālaṭiyum vilakkaṭiyumāṉa kolāl » 4 ç Itil piḷḷai piramātarāyamuttara
raiyar Aracu kūṟu nālil Oṉṟu nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl » � Orumā nikki » 3� Itil Eṅkaḷ mutukkaḷum nāṅkaḷum viṟṟum Oṟṟiyum vaitta » (1/4)mā � nikki » 2mukkāl mā 1kāṇi Innilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle mākāṇi muntiri
kaiyum nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa puṉcey nilattu vaṭapāṭāvūr nilamum Ālakkanakarakuṟucci nilamum viṭṭa Ivaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu vaṭapāṟkellai tiraṇiviḻakku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai pūṉaikkaṟaṭ
ṭukkum cūḷaimeṭṭukkum vaḻukkai kallukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūṟṟattūr Ellaiyil peṟṟāṉ kuḻikkum kaḷappaṉkuṟucci Ellaiyil kucavaṉkuḻikkum koḷkiṉṟāṉ kāṇiyāṉa neṭuṅkūr Ellai
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai neṭuṅkūr Ellaiyil tukumāṇṭāṉ kuḻikkum teṉpāṭāvūr Ellaiyil Ūṟaiṉāṭāḻvāṉ pālañceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai maṇiyankuṟucciyiṟ(p) pokiṟa peruvaḻikkum A
racaṉ pāḻikaraikkum nakarattār matuḷukkum paṟaiccerikku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai naṭuvupaṭṭa paṭutāṅka kuḷamum puṉceyyum mikutikkuṟaivu paṭi patiṉāṟaṭiyum viḷakkaṭiyumāṉa kolāl » » 10 4
» Itil piḷḷai piramātarāya muttaraiyar Aracukūṟu » 10 3 » ddhaḍa4 nikki » � mukkāl ddha6 Innilam nāṟpate mukkāle Irumāvaraiyum Ivaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa maṉaikkum toṭṭattukkum Ellaiyāvatu me
l pāṟkellai nakarattār matuḷukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai teṉpāṭāvūr Ellaiyil Ellaik kallukku teṟkum Itaṉ kiḻakkum teṉ pāṭāvūr Ellai vaṉṉi tevantirapallavaraiyaṉ maṉaikku teṟkum ki
ḻpāṟkellai vaṭakku nokki pokiṟa teruvil Ellaik kallukku kiḻakkum periya maṉṟaēlacānti piṭattu kku teṟkum kucavaṉ Akattukku teṟku nokki pokiṟa teruvil Ellaikkallukku meṟkum Ivvellaik ka
llukku kiḻakku teṉ pāṭāvūr Ellaikkum poṉmāḷiyār toṭṭattukku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nakarattārmatuḷukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai nakarattārmatuḷukku vaṭakkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa maṉaiyum
toṭṭamum maṉṟum kaṉṟunilaippāḻum Uḷpaṭṭa maṉaikaḷil piḷḷaipiramātarāya muttaraiyar Aracukūṟu nāliloṉṟu nikki niṉṟa maṉaikaḷil Eṅkaḷ kuṭiiruppāṉa maṉaiyum toṭṭamum nikki Innāṉkellaikkuṭ paṭṭa
maṉaiyum toṭṭamum naṉcey nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle mākāṇi muntirikaikkum puṉcey paṭutāṅkalāṉa kuḷamum naṉcey tiruttalāṉa nilam Uḷpaṭa nilam nāṟpatemukkāle Iru māvaraiyum Uḷpaṭa Iṟṟai nāḷaā
l viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 10000 5 1000 Ikkācu patiṉaiyyāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaāṭṭeṟṟi kaicelavaṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipirāmaṇaicaivutiṭṭu kuṭutto
m nāyaṉ coṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṟku Ūraṉ nampiyāvāṉ virametāvi peraiyaṉum mallaṉ maṇavāḷaṉāna keṅkataraiyaṉum Ivviruvom Ikkācu patiṉaiyyāyirattukkum Innāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa naṉceykkum
puṉceykkum maṉaikkum toṭṭattukkum maṉṟum kaṉṟum nilaippāḻukkum meṉokkiya maramum kiḻnokkiyakiṇaṟu maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa pirāttikaḷum Uḷpaṭa Ikkācu patiṉaiyyāyiramume vilaiyāvutākavum Itu ve
poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷcelavolaiyāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vi
lai piramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttom nāyan coṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṟku Ūraṉ nampiyāṉa virametāviperaiyaṉum mallanmaṇavāḷaṉāna koṅkataraiyaṉum Ivviruvom Ippaṭikku Itu vaṭapāṭāvūruṭaiya curitimāṉ Ūran mpi
yāṉa virametāviperaiyaṉ cayiñāta(ta)nmaikku Ivvūṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya taṭṭāṉ vaḷḷal Iḷamaitaṭṭāneḻuttu Ippaṭiku(ku) Itu vaṭapāṭāvūrruṭaiya curutimāṉ mallaṉ maṇavāḷaṉāna koṅkataraiyaṉ cayiñāṉatanmaikku Ivai Ila
kciccāṉ taṇakkaṉ Uṟakkatteḻuppi Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Innilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutinen nāṭṭukkaṇakku kuṟucci Uṭaiyāṉ kūṭattāṭ koṇṭāṉ Aṟaṅkāttā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṭapāṭāvūrruṭai
ya curutimān viḻu nāyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṭapāṭāvūruṭaiya curitimāṉ Ūrmaṇavāḷaṉāṉa coḷentira ciṅkanāṭāḻvāṉukku te(ta)puttiraṉāṉaIt may be read tauhitaŪraṉ coḷentira ciṅka nāṭāḻvāṉ cayiñāṉataṉmaikku Ivai paṭu
vūruṭaiyāṉ centāmarai kaṇṇaṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Itu teṉpāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimān vāḻavantā nāyaṉāna cempiyan peraiyan cayiñāṉataṉmaikku Ivūr taccanākanāṭakan ciṅkatevaneḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven teṉpāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimān koyil Ūṟaiyarāyaneḻuttu vaṭapāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimāṉ nampiciyan cayiñānatanmaikku Ivvūrilirukkum vāṇikaril coṉnavāṟaṟivāneḻuttu Irukūruṭaiya curutimān viranmalai kalak
kiyum tiruvan kaṅkaimalai nāṭāḻvāṉum kāmaṉ vicaiyālaiya nāṭāḻvāṉum Immuvar cayiñāṉatanmaikku Ivai toṇṭaparami Uṭaiyāṉ tūṇanuṭaiya piḷḷai Eḻuttu Itu Irukūr Uṭaiyān perumāṉ periyanāṭṭu nampi cayiñāṉa tan
maikku Ivai Damaged and Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.500 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
